question_text: Which of the following statements about magnetic poles is correct?

options.label: A
options.text: Two north poles will attract each other

options.label: B
options.text: A north pole and a south pole will repel each other

options.label: C
options.text: Two south poles will repel each other

options.label: D
options.text: All magnetic poles attract all other magnetic poles

explanation: Like poles repel each other and unlike poles attract. Since both south poles are the same, they repel. This is a fundamental rule of magnetism that applies to all magnets.
